ticket.subject: Welcome to PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money.
ticket.raw_subject: Welcome to PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money.
ticket.description:
Hello Erica,

 Greeting from PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing **WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin** on https://www.happyvalleysoupcompany.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete plugin onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello Erica Kotula,

Greetings from PluginHive!

I am Touseef from the WooCommerce Shipping Services plugin. Thank you for installing the plugin.

I tried reaching you on +1 (814) 440-3324 but was not able to connect.

Also, I observed that you have added your FedEx and Stamps USPS Account with the plugin but have not generated any labels yet. Please let us know if you are facing any difficulty.

We can also provide a free Onboarding for the plugin over a zoom call to help you with the plugin setup and answer your queries. Please let us know your availability for the same.
Alternately, please **click here** to schedule a call as per your availability.

Hope to hear from you soon.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

comments.body:
Follow-up on my last email...I've found that the products associated with they order failing to show up in the shipping area will not sync with your plugin. In Shipping > Products > All products, only 40 of the 56 products will sync. I tried forcing a sync and it ignores an entire category of products. So I tried to import them manually. I started by exporting the current list so I was sure I'd have the correct columns. I adding the products and imported a csv of all the products. It's throwing an error for these 16 products that says "Product ID[3564] is not available in the store yet", where [####] matches the ID for each product. They are available, in stock and being purchased. What setting is off? They are all in the category "Wholesale" as simple products.



--

**Erica Thumma  |  Owner**

Freewheel Creative

Marketing | Graphic Design | Website Design

Woodward, PA

814-440-3324

freewheelcreative.com



 ![](https://freewheelcreative.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/Freewheel-Logo-horizontal-2.png)
comments.html_body:

In Shipping > Products > All products, only 40 of the 56 products will sync. I tried forcing a sync and it ignores an entire category of products. So I tried to import them manually. I started by exporting the current list so I was sure I'd have the correct columns. I adding the products and imported a csv of all the products. It's throwing an error for these 16 products that says "Product ID[3564] is not available in the store yet", where [####] matches the ID for each product. They are available, in stock and being purchased. What setting is off? They are all in the category "Wholesale" as simple products.

comments.body:
Hello Erica Kotula,

Good Day!

The product sync is automatic in the plugin and you cannot add products in the app via CSV Export/Import.

If the products are not syncing with the plugin, we will have to cross check the case.

Please share the WP Admin Access (URL, UserName and Password) for your store along with the Order number in question, so that we can review and assist you further.

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Erica Kotula,
 
Good Day!
 
The product sync is automatic in the plugin and you cannot add products in the app via CSV Export/Import.
 
If the products are not syncing with the plugin, we will have to cross check the case.
 
Please share the WP Admin Access (URL, UserName and Password) for your store along with the Order number in question, so that we can review and assist you further.
 
Awaiting your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Here's a temporary link to access the site: https://www.happyvalleysoupcompany.com/wp-admin/?wtlwp_token=f38a835b0d0d7fdbece4a3fd16df7771c1e0c37073e90b8cc61e776104cc5de414724c393516b578b258f896d732b1d4bb2582db95f32ced00666a24f97f8ac1



**Order No:** #HVSC-5326 Robin Ricardo Ricardo's Country Shoppe


You say you can't import products. I'm not trying to add new products that aren't already in Woocommerce. Just the products that wouldn't sync. There are buttons on the Shipping > Products page for exporting and importing the products to the sync. If that's not the purpose of those buttons and it's only to update information in the sync, it should be better worded to Update Products instead of Import Products.



The products that are not naturally syncing with your plugin are those in the Product Category "Wholesale" (14 products) and "Gift Boxes" (2 products).



Thanks,

-Erica

--

**Erica Thumma  |  Owner**

Freewheel Creative

Marketing | Graphic Design | Website Design

Woodward, PA

814-440-3324

freewheelcreative.com



 ![](https://freewheelcreative.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/Freewheel-Logo-horizontal-2.png)

L3:

https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1759344379019949
US Store using WSS with Stamps USPS and FedEx for rates and labels.
Customer reported that the order **#HVSC-5326** did not import in the plugin because the products in the Order are not imported.
Customer has 59 Published products in WooCommerce but in the app only 40 are available.
Upon checking further, I could observe that all the products which are set as **Category -- Wholesale** in WooCommerce are not imported in the plugin. All these products are **Simple** products in Woo.
Please check the case.

Temporary link to access the site: https://www.happyvalleysoupcompany.com/wp-admin/?wtlwp_token=f38a835b0d0d7fdbece4a3fd16df7771c1e0c37073e90b8cc61e776104cc5de414724c393516b578b258f896d732b1d4bb2582db95f32ced00666a24f97f8ac1

comments.body:
We are unable to retrieve product data for the following items while importing:
- **Stuffed Pepper Soup - Case of 6**
- **Tomato Basil Bisque - Case of 6**
- **Tuscan Minestrone Soup - Case of 6**
- **Potato & Cheese Soup - Case of 6**
- **Corn Chowder - Case of 6**
- **Cock-a-doodle Noodle Soup - Case of 6**

This is because the customer is using the **Product Visibility by User Role for WooCommerce** plugin to restrict product visibility to specific user roles, such as Wholesale. Each of the above products has restricted visibility (see screenshot). This is why products and **#HVSC-5326 order** are not imported to the app.
Please ask the customer to **remove all visibility restrictions from these products**.
If the customer is not willing to remove the visibility restrictions, they will need to **update each product individually**, and we can import them via webhook updates. For example, we successfully imported _**Stuffed Pepper Soup - Case of 6**_ using a webhook delivery update
Currently, bulk import is not possible because WooCommerce does not return products that have visibility restrictions.
-[Athul]

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/lxYc8M9nXwRUlMabi1T3QHgrA/?name=image.png)

comments.body:
Hello Erica,

We have an update for your query.

Upon checking, we observed that the following products are not imported to the plugin.

- **Stuffed Pepper Soup - Case of 6**
- **Tomato Basil Bisque - Case of 6**
- **Tuscan Minestrone Soup - Case of 6**
- **Potato & Cheese Soup - Case of 6**
- **Corn Chowder - Case of 6**
- **Cock-a-doodle Noodle Soup - Case of 6**


The reason for this is we could see that you are using the "Product Visibility User Role for WooCommerce" plugin which restricts the visibility of the details to certain user roles, such as Wholesale. The above mentioned products have this restriction enabled (as shown in below screenshot).
Due to this, all the products associated with the order 5326 are not imported to the plugin.

So, we request you to remove all the visibility restrictions to all the published products in your store. Once done, let us know, so we can try importing those products from our end.

If you are not willing to remove this visibility restriction set for all the products, then you can remove this for certain products individually and we can then import those products to the plugin.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/lxYc8M9nXwRUlMabi1T3QHgrA/?name=image.png)

Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Erica,
 
We have an update for your query.
 
Upon checking, we observed that the following products are not imported to the plugin.
 
  • Stuffed Pepper Soup - Case of 6
  • Tomato Basil Bisque - Case of 6
  • Tuscan Minestrone Soup - Case of 6
  • Potato & Cheese Soup - Case of 6
  • Corn Chowder - Case of 6
  • Cock-a-doodle Noodle Soup - Case of 6
 
The reason for this is we could see that you are using the "Product Visibility User Role for WooCommerce" plugin which restricts the visibility of the details to certain user roles, such as Wholesale. The above mentioned products have this restriction enabled (as shown in below screenshot).
Due to this, all the products associated with the order 5326 are not imported to the plugin. 
 
So, we request you to remove all the visibility restrictions to all the published products in your store. Once done, let us know, so we can try importing those products from our end. 
 
If you are not willing to remove this visibility restriction set for all the products, then you can remove this for certain products individually and we can then import those products to the plugin. 
 

 
Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Request #352437 "Give the WooCommerce Shipping Se..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #352437:

Hello Erica,

 We regret that you had to uninstall our **WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin** from https://www.happyvalleysoupcompany.com

 If you have faced any difficulties with the plugin, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your WooCommerce store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.


> **Did you know?**
>
> - _Our shipping plugin is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more._
> - _This plugin will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s)._
> - _Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click._
> - _Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support._



 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

 We would like to hear from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team
comments.html_body:
Request #352437 "Give the WooCommerce Shipping Se..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #352437:

Hello Erica,

We regret that you had to uninstall our WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin from https://www.happyvalleysoupcompany.com

If you have faced any difficulties with the plugin, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your WooCommerce store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.

Did you know?

  • Our shipping plugin is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more.
  • This plugin will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s).
  • Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click.
  • Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support.

Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

We would like to hear from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
I placed the site in Maintenance mode using the SeedProd plugin. I then disabled the plugin that controls the visibility. I was able to import the wholesale products. A test order confirmed that it can now see those products.



However, as mentioned, it also wasn't importing the Gift Box Category, which are the two products that start with 'You Choose...'. These are composite products. To troubleshoot, I again placed the site in Maintenance Mode, disabled all plugins except WooCommerce and your Shipping plugin and tried again to import products and it would not sync with those two products.



_**Note** - I previously mentioned that this is my third implementation of your shipping plugin. It was implemented first on the Cooke Tavern Soups website. Cooke Tavern Soups also has two composite products using the same plugin. There was not an issue with your plugin seeing those products in February during that implementation. That site also uses the same product visibility plugin as this one does and I don't remember a problem with syncing products at that time. Just mentioning this in case there was a change in code that could be preventing the sync._



Talk soon,

-Erica

--

**Erica Thumma  |  Owner**

Freewheel Creative

Marketing | Graphic Design | Website Design

Woodward, PA

814-440-3324

freewheelcreative.com



 ![](https://freewheelcreative.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/Freewheel-Logo-horizontal-2.png)

comments.body:
Request #352459 "APO Addresses" was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #352459:

Hi - I'm getting an 'Address Not Valid' error for two APO addresses when I try to create a label. I've tried creating an extra zone for this, additional rules, etc. It accepts the order, I just can't create a label. Any thoughts? It is an international APO address but the US treats these as "Domestic". I entered the address into the actual USPS website to see what options I had for mailing and USPS Ground Advantage and USPS Priority Mail were both options. The person chose USPS Ground Advantage during checkout. Rates are appearing in your plugin, but the address is throwing an error even if I change the mailing option to Priority. I've included a screenshot of the address as the USPS website presents it as well as how it appears in your plugin. I've also included the log.

comments.body:
Hello Erica Kotula,

Thank you for your response.

Regarding the Composite products, the plugin does not support such products at the moment.

However, as you have shared that the _Cooke Tavern Soups_ store has 2 composite products which are working correctly with the plugin, we would like to review the store and the products from our end.
Could you please share the WP Admin Access for the store so that we can review and check your case further?

Additionally, APO addresses are not supported for shipping via Stamps USPS APIs. You can try generating the shipping labels for such orders directly from Stamps.com

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

Could you please share the WP Admin Access for the store so that we can review and check your case further?
 
Additionally, APO addresses are not supported for shipping via Stamps USPS APIs. You can try generating the shipping labels for such orders directly from Stamps.com
 
Awaiting your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Dear Erica,

Thank you for your patience and understanding.

At the moment, the plugin supports standard WooCommerce products (Simple and Variant) and does not support custom product types such as composite products, bundle products, etc. However, we do plan to enhance the plugin to include this functionality in the future.

This enhancement has been added to our development roadmap, and we’ll keep you informed once it’s implemented. Unfortunately, we don’t have an exact ETA for this feature yet.

We truly appreciate your understanding, and please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any further questions.

Regards,

Sibi
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Dear Erica,
 
Thank you for your patience and understanding.

This enhancement has been added to our development roadmap, and we’ll keep you informed once it’s implemented. Unfortunately, we don’t have an exact ETA for this feature yet.
 
We truly appreciate your understanding, and please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any further questions.
 
Regards,
 
Sibi
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
You're right, it doesn't really work with composite products. It wants to pack everything as a separate item rather than in the box that's part of the composite product.



It doesn't seem to affect our pricing so it's ok that it's doing that but please add this to your road map. If someone ordered multiple composite products, which they do around the holidays, it could cause issues with shipping pricing.



Thanks,

-Erica
